evals.prompt: Set up Tailwind CSS in my Vite + Vue 3 project from scratch.
evals.expected_output: Guide through installing @tailwindcss/vite, configuring vite.config.ts plugin, creating CSS import with @import 'tailwindcss'
expectations: Shows vite.config.ts with tailwindcss() in plugins array
Does not reference tailwind.config.js (v4 uses CSS-based config)

evals.prompt: Create a cn() utility function for merging Tailwind classes conditionally.
evals.expected_output: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge
expectations: Imports clsx and ClassValue type from 'clsx'
Exports the cn function with ...inputs: ClassValue[] parameter

evals.prompt: Create a Button component with CVA variants for variant (default, destructive, outline) and size (sm, md, lg) using TypeScript.
evals.expected_output: Vue SFC with cva() definition, VariantProps type extraction, cn() usage
expectations: Uses cva() from 'class-variance-authority' to define button variants
Extracts VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> for type-safe props
Uses cn() to merge variant classes with custom class prop
